results.rendered_html:
atiśayin a. [śī-ini]
1 Superior; excellent; pre-eminent; śriyamatiśayinīṃ sametya jagmuḥ  Ki. 10. 25 ; idamuttamamatiśayini vyaṃgye vācyād dhvanirbudhaiḥ kathitaḥ  K. P. 1 ; ˚yini samāptā vaṃśa evāśiṣaste  V. 5. 21. 
2 Excessive, abundant.
